hero.css: .hero_001 { position: relative; isolation: isolate; overflow: hidden; min-height: 100svh; display: grid; place-items: stretch; padding: clamp(22px, 4vw, 56px); color: #2f2723; background: radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(196, 127, 93, 0.18) 0 18%, transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 18% 78%, rgba(158, 103, 73, 0.14) 0 16%, transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, #fffaf4 0%, #f7eee4 48%, #ead9cc 100%); font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .hero_001::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 18px; z-index: -2; border: 1px solid rgba(110, 76, 56, 0.16); border-radius: 34px; pointer-events: none; } .hero_001::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: min(52vw, 650px); aspect-ratio: 1; right: -14vw; top: -10vw; z-index: -1; border-radius: 50%; background: repeating-conic-gradient(from 18deg, rgba(137, 91, 63, 0.18) 0deg 2deg, transparent 2deg 12deg), radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 42%, rgba(255,255,255,0.42) 43% 44%, transparent 45% 100%); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 28%, #000 29% 72%, transparent 73%); opacity: 0.9; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.02fr) minmax(320px, 0.78fr); gap: clamp(28px, 5vw, 86px); align-items: center; width: min(1240px, 100%); margin: auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { position: relative; padding: clamp(22px, 3vw, 44px) 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin: 0 0 22px; color: #7c5a47; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before { content: ""; width: 48px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(124,90,71,0), rgba(124,90,71,0.8)); } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin: 0; font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", "Playfair Display", serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: clamp(4.6rem, 11vw, 10.6rem); line-height: 0.82; letter-spacing: -0.075em; color: #2d241f; text-wrap: balance; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title span { display: block; } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { display: inline-block; margin-left: clamp(18px, 5vw, 70px); color: #a56d4b; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.64em; letter-spacing: -0.04em; transform: translateY(-0.02em); } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { max-width: 680px; margin: clamp(26px, 3vw, 38px) 0 0; color: rgba(47, 39, 35, 0.78); font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.35vw, 1.22rem); line-height: 1.78; font-weight: 400; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; margin-top: clamp(30px, 4vw, 52px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 46px; padding: 12px 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(92, 62, 46, 0.16); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 252, 248, 0.54); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); box-shadow: 0 14px 44px rgba(73, 50, 37, 0.07); color: #4f3a30; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { position: relative; min-height: 650px; display: grid; place-items: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { position: relative; width: min(100%, 470px); min-height: 620px; border-radius: 250px 250px 32px 32px; background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.72), rgba(255,250,244,0.34)); border: 1px solid rgba(101, 72, 57, 0.18); box-shadow: 0 34px 90px rgba(80, 51, 38, 0.16), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.82); overflow: hidden; backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 22px; border-radius: 230px 230px 24px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(150, 99, 67, 0.16); background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 23%, rgba(174, 111, 72, 0.16), transparent 32%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.18), rgba(214,173,142,0.12)); } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: auto -24% -18% -24%; height: 44%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(155, 100, 69, 0.22), transparent 68%); filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { position: absolute; top: 56px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 230px; aspect-ratio: 1; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; color: #3b2d27; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,251,246,0.92) 0 55%, rgba(229,201,180,0.58) 56% 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(116, 82, 62, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(87, 57, 43, 0.16); text-align: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dateInner { display: grid; gap: 4px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8a624d; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 4.8rem; line-height: 0.86; letter-spacing: -0.06em; color: #2f2723; } .hero_001 .hero_001__year { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #8a624d; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pattern { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 51%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 330px; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.62; background: repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(126,83,58,0.24) 0deg 1.2deg, transparent 1.2deg 11.25deg), radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 35%, rgba(255,255,255,0.7) 36% 37%, transparent 38% 100%); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 23%, #000 24% 64%, transparent 65%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__venuePanel { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 54px; transform: translateX(-50%); width: min(78%, 330px); padding: 24px 24px 22px; border-radius: 28px; background: rgba(255, 252, 248, 0.68); border: 1px solid rgba(99, 68, 51, 0.16); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(78, 50, 36, 0.13); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); text-align: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venueLabel { margin: 0 0 9px; color: #9a6a50; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { margin: 0; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2rem); line-height: 1.06; color: #342821; } .hero_001 .hero_001__location { margin: 10px 0 0; color: rgba(47,39,35,0.68); font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 650; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark { position: absolute; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(164, 105, 71, 0.22); box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(164,105,71,0.055); } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark--one { width: 14px; height: 14px; top: 18%; right: 6%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark--two { width: 9px; height: 9px; top: 66%; left: 3%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark--three { width: 18px; height: 18px; bottom: 15%; right: 13%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__sideText { position: absolute; right: -42px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(90deg); transform-origin: center; color: rgba(77, 52, 39, 0.46); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 { min-height: auto; padding: 26px; } .hero_001::before { inset: 12px; border-radius: 26px; } .hero_001::after { width: 78vw; right: -34vw; top: -18vw; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { padding: 34px 4px 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size: clamp(4.4rem, 18vw, 8.6rem); } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { max-width: 760px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 560px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { width: min(100%, 520px); min-height: 540px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { top: 44px; width: 196px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-size: 4.1rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__sideText { right: -24px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { padding: 18px; } .hero_001::before { inset: 8px; border-radius: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { padding-top: 26px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { margin-bottom: 18px; font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before { width: 32px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size: clamp(4rem, 22vw, 6.2rem); line-height: 0.86; } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { margin-left: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { margin-top: 22px; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.68; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { gap: 9px; margin-top: 24px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pill { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 13px; font-size: 0.74rem; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 500px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { min-height: 488px; border-radius: 190px 190px 26px 26px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch::before { inset: 14px; border-radius: 176px 176px 20px 20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { top: 34px; width: 168px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month { font-size: 0.66rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-size: 3.45rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__year { font-size: 0.78rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pattern { width: 260px; top: 50%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venuePanel { bottom: 34px; width: calc(100% - 48px); padding: 20px 18px 18px; border-radius: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { font-size: 1.42rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__location { font-size: 0.84rem; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark--one { right: 9%; top: 21%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark--two { left: 8%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__sideText { display: none; } }
hero.designNotes: A minimal romantic luxury hero with warm ivory gradients, asymmetrical oversized editorial typography, glassmorphism date and venue elements, and subtle Gujarati-inspired geometric patterning without overt religious iconography.
hero.html:
Wedding celebration

Kavya&Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

March 22, 2026Akshar Grand PalaceSomerset, New Jersey
March222026

The celebration

Akshar Grand Palace

Somerset, New Jersey
